eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Escambia, AL; at 2:15 AM on JUN 19, 2026 Effective until 4:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: FLOOD ALERT: Big Escambia Creek at Magnolia Branch Wildlife Reserve is rising rapidly. No mandatory evacuation is in effect at this time. Campers and residents near the creek should remain alert, monitor conditions closely, and be prepared to move to higher ground if conditions worsen.
